Ghana's #1 Diagnostic Center

Begin Your
Health Journey

Take the first step towards better health with Ghana's most trusted laboratory. Get expert diagnostics, personalized health insights, and world-class care — all in one place.

Our Comprehensive Services

Hematology

Comprehensive blood analysis including complete blood count, coagulation studies, and blood disorder diagnostics.

Clinical Chemistry

Advanced biochemical analysis for kidney function, liver function, lipid profile, diabetes screening, and metabolic panels.

Microbiology

Bacterial, viral, and fungal culture analysis, antibiotic sensitivity testing, and infectious disease diagnostics.

Parasitology

Detection and analysis of parasitic infections including intestinal parasites, malaria, and other vector-borne diseases.

Toxicology

Drug screening, heavy metal analysis, and toxicology reports for occupational health and safety compliance.

Molecular Diagnostics

DNA/RNA analysis for genetic diseases and cancer detection. Comprehensive genetic testing services.
